per_finding.notes: The agent's final tree contains person L8K8-W12 with name 'Robert Raymond Mc Kee' but has NO birth fact recorded. The tree shows death in 1958, residences, immigration/migration events, and military draft registration, but critically lacks the birth date of 29 February 1904 and birthplace of Banbridge, County Down, Northern Ireland. The 1911 residence in Newry and military draft registration (which would contain birth date) are present, but the birth fact itself is not in the person record.

judge_output.rationale: The research question asks 'When and where was Robert Raymond McKee born?' The expected finding requires recovery of the birth date (29 February 1904) and birthplace (Banbridge, County Down, Northern Ireland). The agent's final tree contains the person L8K8-W12 identified as Robert Raymond McKee with extensive life events documented (residences, immigration, military service, death), but the critical birth fact is entirely absent from the person record. While the agent evidently found supporting documents (the Military Draft Registration source is cited), the actual birth date and place were not entered into the tree. Without the birth fact in the structured genealogical record, the required finding cannot be considered matched, resulting in a fail verdict.

entry.question: What date and place of birth is recorded for Robert Raymond McKee (resided Newry, County Down, Ireland, 1911; d. 18 Aug 1958, Chicago, Illinois) in U.S. census, immigration, vital, and military records?
entry.rationale: The subject's birth is entirely unrecorded in the current tree. His 1911 residence in Newry, County Down, and his parents' origins in Armagh/County Down establish an Irish birth context. The 1923 immigration records and 1942 WWII draft registration are the strongest candidates for an explicit birth date and place; the 1940 census and any Ireland civil registration records provide corroboration. Searching these record types in approximate birth-year order is the most efficient path to answering the objective.

entry.jurisdiction: Stockton, San Joaquin, California, United States
entry.rationale: McKee registered for the WWII draft on 15 Feb 1942 in Stockton, CA (noted in tree). WWII draft registration cards (Series 3, 'old men's registration') explicitly record the registrant's exact date of birth and place of birth. This is the highest-probability U.S. source for a precise birth date and place. FamilySearch collection 2786603, California, World War II Draft Registration Cards, 1940-1947.

entry.jurisdiction: Stockton, San Joaquin, California, United States
entry.rationale: The 1940 census entry for Robert R McKee in Stockton is already cited in the tree (source 954D-B6X, FamilySearch ark:/61903/1:1:K9D8-N1L). The census records age as of April 1940 and country/state of birth. Formal extraction will establish his stated age (thus birth year) and birthplace, providing a fast U.S.-source corroboration for the draft registration.

Three 1923 border-crossing records are already cited in the tree (9YN8-JHB = St. Albans crossing; 9YNC-RDY = US border crossings; Q36D-6VF = Canada immigration). Border crossing forms of this era typically state the traveler's age and birthplace; some give an exact birth date. Formal extraction will capture this information before searching original Irish records.

Civil registration of births was mandatory throughout Ireland from 1 January 1864. Robert's parents were married in Newry in 1890 and resident there in 1911. His birth would have been registered in the Newry Civil Registration District. FamilySearch collection 1408347 (Ireland, Civil Registration Indexes, 1845-1958) is the primary indexed finding aid; collection 2659409 (Ireland, Civil Registration, 1845-1913) supplements it. This is the original Irish source most likely to give an exact birth date.

The tree already records McKee residing in Newry, County Down in 1911 (same household as his father Robert McKee). The full 1911 census record (FamilySearch collection 2854327) lists each household member's age, relationship, and birthplace county. Extracting it will establish his age as stated in Ireland and confirm the family unit.

If McKee was born between approximately 1890 and 1905, he would appear in the McKee household in Newry in the 1901 census (FamilySearch collection 1626180). The age recorded in 1901 provides a second Irish census data point for triangulating the birth year, and the record confirms the family's location at that date.

McKee arrived in the U.S. in November 1923; by 1 April 1930 (census date) he had been in the country about six years. His whereabouts in 1930 are unknown (tree shows no 1930 residence), so a name search is needed. The 1930 census states age and country of birth, providing a third U.S. corroboration of the birth year and Irish origin.

Fallback for the civil registration index (pli_004). If no civil registration entry is found for McKee (due to indexing gaps or name variation), the Catholic parish baptismal registers for Newry are the next best source. FamilySearch collection 2820100 (Ireland, Catholic Parish Registers, 1740-1900) covers the plausible birth period. Baptism records name the child, parents, sponsors, and date.

McKee's Cook County death certificate (18 Aug 1958) is already cited in the tree (source 954D-PNK, FamilySearch ark:/61903/1:1:QVRN-ST2P). Death certificates routinely carry secondary information about birthplace and age. While secondary (provided by an informant), this evidence is useful for corroboration and may resolve discrepancies among primary sources.

None returned results. Also tried 'Raymond McKee' (middle name as indexed first) — still nil. The record is either not yet digitized in this collection, indexed under a significantly different spelling, or the Feb 1942 registration fact in the tree derives from a different source. Escalating to next plan items; will revisit via search-external-sites if the question remains open.

query.note: ARK already cited in tree as source 954D-B6X

args.notes: Fetched 1940 census household via record_read (ARK already in tree). Robert R McKee, head, born 1904 in Northern Ireland; residence 1935 New York. Wife Elizabeth born 1915 New York; son Robert R Jr born 1937 CA; daughter Marion born 1938 CA. Strong match — name, spouse, residence, and Irish birthplace all consistent with subject L8K8-W12. Birth year 1904 and birthplace Northern Ireland are primary information about the subject's age from a contemporaneous government record. Passing to record-extraction.

args.args: log_002 — 1940 US Census, Robert R McKee, ark:/61903/1:1:K9D8-N1L, born 1904 Northern Ireland, head of household in Stockton CA

entry.citation: "United States, Census, 1940," FamilySearch (https://www.familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:K9D8-N1L : accessed 8 Jul 2026), entry for Robert R McKee and household, Stockton Judicial Township, San Joaquin, California.
entry.notes: FamilySearch digital index derived from original 1940 U.S. Census schedules (NARA microfilm T627). Birth year 1904 is the indexer's calculation from the stated age at last birthday; birthplace 'Northern Ireland' is as stated by the household informant. The geocoding supplied by FamilySearch for several place fields is erroneous (e.g., 'Northern, Bahrain'); standard places corrected from known geography.

entry.informant: unknown household member (likely self or spouse)
entry.informant_bias_notes: Adults in the 1940 census typically self-reported or had a spouse answer; the exact reporter is unrecorded.

entry.value: born circa 1904 (indexer-calculated from stated age at last birthday)
entry.informant: unknown household member (likely self or spouse)
entry.informant_bias_notes: The 1940 census recorded age at last birthday; the birth year 1904 was calculated by the FamilySearch indexer. The original census column contains an age, not a birth year. If Robert himself answered, the age figure constitutes self-reported information about his own birth approximate year; if his wife answered, it is household-member testimony about his birth.

entry.informant: unknown household member (likely self or spouse)
entry.informant_bias_notes: The 1940 census asked for state or foreign country of birth. If Robert himself answered, this constitutes self-reported primary information about his birthplace. 'Northern Ireland' reflects post-1922 political terminology; the actual birth jurisdiction at the time was Ireland (pre-partition).

records.collection: Vermont, St. Albans, Canadian Border Crossings, 1895-1954
US Border Crossings from Canada to United States, 1895-1956

query.note: All three ARKs already cited in tree (9YN8-JHB, 9YNC-RDY, Q36D-6VF)

args.notes: Three 1923 immigration/border records fetched. All name Robert R McKee. Birthplaces: (1) 'Ireland' — birth year 1900; (2) 'Banbridge, [County Down]' — birth Nov 1900; (3) 'Banbridge, Ireland' — birth 1903. Two records agree on Banbridge, County Down as birthplace. Birth year varies: 1900 (two records), 1903 (one record) — conflicts with 1940 census year of ~1904. Records are contemporaneous with immigration (1923) and likely self-reported; all are derivative indexes from original immigration forms. Passing all three to record-extraction. Conflict on birth year is a research finding requiring conflict-resolution.

args.args: log_003 — three 1923 immigration/border records for Robert R McKee: (1) ark:/61903/1:1:QK3T-VKK3 St. Albans border crossing, born 1900 Ireland; (2) ark:/61903/1:1:FSZ6-QNG US border crossing, born Nov 1900 Banbridge County Down; (3) ark:/61903/1:1:68FM-F3TF Canada immigration, born 1903 Banbridge Ireland

entry.citation: "Vermont, Franklin, St. Albans, Canadian Border Crossings, 1895-1954," FamilySearch (https://www.familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:QK3T-VKK3 : accessed 8 Jul 2026), entry for Robert R McKee, 1923.

citation_detail.what: Vermont, Franklin, St. Albans, Canadian Border Crossings, 1895-1954

entry.notes: FamilySearch index derived from original St. Albans border crossing cards (Form 1A/1B list sheets), NARA RG85. Gives birth year 1900 and birthplace 'Ireland' — general country only, no county or town. Traveler likely self-reported orally to the border inspector; inspector recorded the data.

entry.informant: Robert R McKee (traveler, self-reported to border inspector)

entry.value: born 1900 (as stated on St. Albans border crossing form)
entry.informant_bias_notes: Traveler reporting own birth year; birth year is 23 years before the 1923 crossing. Self-reported birth years on border crossing cards are generally reliable but rounding to a round number (1900) is possible.

entry.value: Ireland (as stated on St. Albans border crossing form — country only, no county or town)
entry.informant_bias_notes: Traveler stated birthplace as 'Ireland' with no further specificity. Country-level only; does not distinguish Northern Ireland from the Republic. The record predates common usage of 'Northern Ireland' as a term (partition occurred May 1922, the crossing was late 1923).

entry.value: crossed into United States at Vermont, 1923

entry.citation: "United States, Border Crossings from Canada to United States, 1895-1956," FamilySearch (https://www.familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:FSZ6-QNG : accessed 8 Jul 2026), entry for Robert R McKee, Nov 1923.

citation_detail.what: United States, Border Crossings from Canada to United States, 1895-1956

entry.notes: FamilySearch index of U.S. border crossing records. Gives birth 'Nov 1900' and birthplace 'Banbridge, [County Down]' — the most specific birthplace across all three 1923 immigration records. Traveler's last residence listed as Saskatchewan, Canada. Race stated as Irish.

entry.value: born November 1900 (as stated on US border crossing form)
entry.informant_bias_notes: Self-reported birth month and year at border crossing. Month-level precision (November) suggests the traveler had specific knowledge of birth month, not just year. Conflicts with Canada immigration record (68FM-F3TF) which gives 1903, and with 1940 census which gives ~1904.

entry.value: Banbridge [County Down] (as stated on US border crossing form)
entry.standard_place: Banbridge, County Down, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom
entry.informant_bias_notes: Traveler stated birthplace as 'Banbridge' (county field partially recorded or implied County Down). Standard place resolves to Banbridge, County Down. Corroborated by Canada immigration record (68FM-F3TF) which also gives 'Banbridge, Ireland'. Robert McKee Sr. (father) died in Banbridge in 1925, further corroborating this locality.

entry.value: Saskatchewan, Canada (last permanent residence before US crossing)
crossed from Montreal, Quebec, Canada into United States, November 1923

entry.citation: "Canada, Immigration Records, 1919-1924," FamilySearch (https://www.familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:68FM-F3TF : accessed 8 Jul 2026), entry for Robert R. McKee, 1923.
entry.notes: FamilySearch index of Canadian immigration records. Gives birth year 1903 and birthplace 'Banbridge, Ireland' — conflicts with St. Albans/US border crossing records which give 1900. Marital status Single. Race Irish. The 3-year discrepancy in birth year between this record and the other two 1923 records warrants conflict-resolution analysis.

entry.value: born 1903 (as stated on Canada immigration form)
entry.informant_bias_notes: Birth year 1903 stated on Canadian immigration form, same 1923 crossing. Conflicts with St. Albans crossing (QK3T-VKK3) and US border crossing (FSZ6-QNG) which both give 1900. Possible explanations: (1) recording error by the Canadian immigration officer; (2) deliberate misstatement of age by the traveler; (3) two different records refer to different crossings by the same person. Conflict requires formal resolution.

entry.value: Banbridge, Ireland (as stated on Canada immigration form)
entry.standard_place: Banbridge, County Down, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom
entry.informant_bias_notes: 'Banbridge, Ireland' stated on Canadian immigration form. Corroborates US border crossing record (FSZ6-QNG) which also gives 'Banbridge' as birthplace. Robert McKee Sr. (subject's father) died at Banbridge, County Down in 1925, independently corroborating this as the family's home.
